title: tribulus eichlerianus
intro: Tribulus eichlerianus is a perennial plant species in the family Zygophyllaceae, native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Australia and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. Tribulus eichlerianus has been traditionally used to support cardiovascular health, improve immune function, and enhance physical performance. It is often prepared in herbal supplements, teas, or infusions, and has been studied for its potential in reducing inflammation, improving exercise performance, and supporting prostate health.
